TA.Agent.AnomalyBenefit:
Each time you advance, pick one:
  • Practice: Mark Practiced on any Ability.
  • Be Known: Erase Practiced from an Ability, and ask your Team that Ability's questions. Mark the track of the answer that gets the most votes, and receive any unlocked Abilities.
TA.Agent.AnomalyMissionEnd: When you receive Probation, advance on the track and gain any benefit, without striking out any boxes from other tracks.
TA.Agent.AskTheAgencyMsg: Asks the Agency to adjust Reality, using [quality].
TA.Agent.BystanderMatched: A Bystander is not currently associated with this Relationship. However, a Bystander with the same name has been found. You may also create a new Bystander. How would you like to proceed?
TA.Agent.BystanderUnmatched: A Bystander is not currently associated with this Relationship. You may create a new Bystander. How would you like to proceed?
TA.Agent.CompetencyBenefit: Each time you advance, increase your maximum Quality Assurances in a Quality by 1, then gain 3 Commendations.
TA.Agent.CompetencyMissionEnd: When you receive MVP, advance on the track and gain any benefit, without striking out any boxes from other tracks.
TA.Agent.MyPlayedByDescr: You have been assigned to play the following people when they appear in game. Click on a character to summon their sheet.
TA.Agent.RealityBenefit: Each time you advance, increase your Connection with any Relationship by 1, then repeat for each Networked Relationship.
TA.Agent.RealityMissionEnd: When you receive neither MVP nor Probation, you may increase your Connection with any Relationship by 1.
TA.Agent.SanctionedBehaviorsBonus: If you perform all 3 in a single Mission, gain +3 bonus Commendations.
TA.Agent.SkillCheckMsg: Uses Skill: Check! to become an expert in a skill they don't have.
TA.Agent.TricendenceOptions:
Succeed and choose an option:
  • All Hands:Add any number of 3s to this roll.
  • Circle Back:Refresh any 3 QAs.
  • Employee of the Moment:Receive 3 Commendations.
TA.Agent.TricendenceOptionsLimited:
Succeed and choose an option:
  • Circle Back:Refresh any 3 QAs.
  • Employee of the Moment:Receive 3 Commendations.
TA.Chat.ATAFailure: <Reality/The narrative> retailiates. In addition, further attempts to alter Reality in this location suffer +1 Burnout.
TA.Chat.ATASuccess: Your Causality Chain comes into effect.
TA.Chat.D10DemeritAdjust: Spend 3 Demerits to adjust the value by 1.
TA.Chat.D10FailOn3: And automatically fails with a 3.
TA.Chat.D10QAAdjust: Spend 1 QA to adjust the value by 1.
TA.Chat.D6DemeritAdjust: Spend 3 Demerits to set the d6 to any value.
TA.Chat.D6QAAdjust: Spend 1 QA to set the d6 to any value.
TA.Chat.UNL3ASH: You may choose to activate the Success and Outcomes, including Triscendence, of any number of your Anomaly Abilities in quick succession, or all at once. Spend the seven 3s between them however you like (Success and Triscendence are free). When all seven 3s are spent, UNL3ASH ends.
TA.ConfirmGenerateWeather: This will clear generate Weather and the starting Chaos for the current Mission, based on the current number of Loose Ends. Are you sure that you want to do this?
TA.ConfirmResetWeather: This will clear all the history of accumulated Weather conditions for the Branch. Are you sure that you want to do that?
TA.D20.Failure: You fail. You must select one aspect of your established biography that now no longer happened, as a result of the failed Causality manipulation.
TA.D20.Success: You succeed, by altering your personal historical Causality Chain to make yourself an expert at whatever it is you're attempting, overwriting your previous history with this new one.
TA.Dialog.D6OptionsDemerit: Pay 3 Demerits to set the dice value to
TA.Dialog.D6OptionsQA: Pay 1 QA to set the dice value to
TA.Dialog.DeleteConfirm: Are you sure that you want to delete this?
TA.Journal.MissingPlaywall: That Playwall Code doesn't seem to be in the system yet
TA.Mission.AwardLeadIn: As General Manager, please apply the following Awards and/or Penalties, based on the Mission Report and Final Grade:
TA.Mission.Incomplete: The Mission Report must be completed before it can be marked as Resolved.
TA.Mission.MVPAward: [agent] may wear the Socks of Success, and may mark one box on the Competency track and gain its benefits without striking out any boxes from other tracks.
TA.Mission.NoActiveMission: There is no single currently active Mission.
TA.Mission.ParticipationAward: [agent] may add one Connection to any Relationship.
TA.Mission.ProbationAward: [agent] must wear the Red Flag of Disrepute, and may mark one box on the Anomaly track and gain its benefits without striking out any boxes from other tracks.
TA.PlaywallSyncWarning: This action will attempt to re-sync the Agent's Playwall with their permissions in the Playwall journal. Because Foundry only assigns permissions at the Player rather than Character level, the same Player owning multiple characters will result in the Characters' Playwall permissions merging. Use this function if you assign or detach a Character from a Player, in order to re-align their Playwall permissions.
TA.Quality.Attentiveness.description:
• Showing attention to detail
• Understanding complicated information
• discovering what someone is trying to hide
TA.Quality.Duplicity.description:
• Lying
• Convincing while unconvinced
• Supporting while internally unsupportive
TA.Quality.Dynamism.description:
• Aggressing
• Dominating
• Taking action
• Using force to get your point across
TA.Quality.Empathy.description:
• Relating to others
• Expressing concern
• Finding weaknesses; connecting
TA.Quality.Initiative.description:
• Forward thinking
• Moving quickly
• Handling things before they become a problem
TA.Quality.Persistence.description:
• Refusing to back down
• Putting pressure on
• Overwhelming & irritating others into action
TA.Quality.Presence.description:
• Standing out in a crowd
• Commanding a group
• Inspiring
• Intimidating
TA.Quality.Professionalism.description:
• Showing poise under pressure
• Resisting distraction
• Interrupting mind-altering effects
TA.Quality.Subtlety.description:
• Working quietly
• Avoiding attention
• Acting with careful precision
TA.Setting.autoATABurnoutHint: Automatically increment the location Burnout on an Ask the Agency failure
TA.Setting.HighlightActionHint: Emphasize clickable actions in text blocks
TA.Setting.ManualStandingHint: GM assigns Standing rather than having it automatically change with Demerits
TA.Setting.PlayerExtraHint: Allow Players to adjust Max QAs and create Connections
TA.Setting.PlayerExtraPlaywallHint: Allow Players to manipulate Work/Life and Anomaly Ability tracks
TA.Setting.SceneBurnoutHint: Link Ask the Agency Burnout to the current active Scene
TA.Setting.TransparentWindowHint: Show transparent backgrounds in Actor and Item windows
TA.Sponsorship.Description: The Sponsors require the following tributes when using the Sponsorship Die. Adjust as needed.
TA.Standing7: We Had Such High Hopes For You
TA.Standing8: There Is Still Time to Change
TA.Unraveling.Restriction0: No restrictions other than those provided by the terms of Agency employment.
TA.Unraveling.Restriction11: Agents’ Relationships will spontaneously remind them of their Agency duties and the importance of reducing Loose Ends during otherwise normal conversations.
TA.Unraveling.Restriction22: To receive the effects of a Triscendence, Agents must give a short speech affirming their commitment to undoing Loose Ends and Stabilizing Reality.
TA.Unraveling.Restriction33: Agents must count aloud to 3 before making any roll.
TA.Unraveling.Restriction44: Agents are no longer eligible for MVP until the Loose Ends count drops below 44.
TA.Unraveling.Restriction55: Read Agents the following: "All Agents will have their contracts terminated if the Loose End count reaches 66. If you are unable to reduce this number through missions, you must work additional hours: strike out one box from the end of all Work-Life Balance tracks to remove 6 Loose Ends on your own."
TA.Unraveling.Restriction66: At the end of the current Mission, the active Field Team is forced into retirement. They must select from among the retirement options available to them. If they have none, they are sent to the Vault. The Loose End count for this region is reduced by 11, and an additional 11 for each Agent that uses a retirement option provided by their Competency.
TA.Unraveling.Restriction77: The Unraveling threatens to begin. To avoid this, the Branch's region will be removed from existence. Go to W7.
TA.Weather.10a: Random thoughts throughout this region begin manifesting as Ripples. Particularly heightened thoughts or emotions can create a tiny, aggressive personification of that feeling with 1 Threat and 1 Stability.
TA.Weather.10b: Random thoughts throughout this region begin manifesting as Ripples. Any time Chaos is spent, that many Ripples are created: recent sentences spoken at the table are personified as tiny aggressive monsters with 1 Threat and 1 Stability
TA.Weather.10c: As this Mission begins, 1,000 Ripples are swarming the Region. Each one that is found and defeated is forgotten, its actions remembered only as intrusive thoughts or unlucky coincidences.
TA.Weather.11a: Agents wake up experiencing each others' lives. Their Realities and Relationships are randomly swapped for the duration of the Mission.
TA.Weather.11b: The first time each Agent would see a Relationship this Mission, that Relationship has been replaced with a version of the Agent whose player typically plays them, with the same relationship to the Agent the relationship had.
TA.Weather.11c: For the duration of this Mission, all players play as a different players' Agent.
TA.Weather.13: Bad Luck! Your General Manager has died and must be replaced with a new one.
TA.Weather.14a: Agents can activate On a failure effects on Anomaly skills at any time without rolling or generating Chaos.
TA.Weather.14b: Agents can activate On a failure effects on Anomaly skills at any time without rolling or generating Chaos. Each time this is done, 3 Chaos is removed from the pool.
TA.Weather.14c: Agents can activate On a failure effects on Anomaly skills at any time without rolling or generating Chaos. Each time this is done, 3 Chaos is removed from the pool. In addition, each time an On a success or On a failure effect is activated as the result of a roll, the opposite effect is also activated.
TA.Weather.16a: A bitter chill in the air.
TA.Weather.16b: Snow is forming on the ground and falling, upward, to the clouds.
TA.Weather.16c: A great bird made of ice and snow, an Anomaly with the Focus "Resentment of the challenges of Winter," takes up residence at the highest point in the region your Branch covers. Your region will experience unseasonable cold, wind, and deep snow until something is done about it.
TA.Weather.17a: For the duration of this Mission, people are often approached by or found in proximity of animals with traits they idealize.
TA.Weather.17b: For the duration of this Mission, people are often approached by or found in proximity of animals with traits they idealize. The animals will speak to people in languages they understand, though they're still animals.
TA.Weather.17c: The world has shifted. For the duration of this Mission, there are no humans or humanoids. Everyone in the world is a talking animal instead, and people remember the world as always being this way.
TA.Weather.19a: A previously captured or neutralized Anomaly is recreated as a Hollow, an unstable version of the original Anomaly that will become stable and permanent if it can kill an Agent and absorb their Resonance. The Hollow assists the Target during this Mission.
TA.Weather.19b: Two previously captured or neutralized Anomalies are recreated as Hollows, unstable versions of themselves that will become stable and permanent if they devour an Agent. The Hollows assist the Target during this mission
TA.Weather.19c: Three previously captured or neutralized Anomalies are recreated as Hollows, unstable versions of themselves that will become stable and permanent if they devour an Agent. The Hollows assist the Target during this mission.
TA.Weather.2a: The Agents' new Mission is an exact Mission they've done before, with every detail the same. No-one except for the Field Team, including the Agency, remembers that it already happened.
TA.Weather.2b: The Agents' new Mission is an exact Mission they've done before, with every detail the same except there are 2 of every important figure (the Anomaly, relevant NPCs). No one except for the Field Team, including the Agency, remembers that it already happened. Duplicates work together to accomplish goals, they barely acknowledge each other, and are unconcerned with their existence as duplicates.
TA.Weather.2c: The Agents wake up inhabiting the lives of important participants in a previous Mission. They must act out the Mission until their actual selves arrive to capture the Anomaly. Anything they change is changed in the original timeline of the Mission. This can have ripple effects on the time since then.
TA.Weather.3: Loose End Located! Agency employees remove 1 Loose End.
TA.Weather.3Multiple: Loose Ends Located! Agency employees remove [count] Loose Ends.
TA.Weather.4a: Everyone is reluctant to leave their cars. For the duration of this Mission, mundane people spend as much time as possible inside vehicles.
TA.Weather.4b: Everyone is reluctant to leave their cars. For the duration of this Mission, mundane people spend as much time as possible inside vehicles. They will not willingly leave a car for any reason, and anyone forced to leave will do whatever they can to return. Anyone without a car woke up to find they have one now. Peoples' cars also include whimsical amenities such as external robot hands and a modest vertical jump.
TA.Weather.4c: For the duration of this Mission, everyone in the world is an anthropomorphic car. Non-one remembers an alternative to this.
TA.Weather.5a: Guilt weighs heavily on the world. All citizens of the region around this Branch will tend toward apology and regret. Agents can remove 5 Chaos from the pool by giving a sincere apology for something they genuinely regret.
TA.Weather.5b: Guilt weighs heavily on the world. All citizens of the region around this Branch will tend toward apology and regret, but forgiveness is impossible. For the duration of this Mission, no-one may forgive.
TA.Weather.5c: Judgment is watching. Ask each Agent privately for 3 things they believe are "kind of awful for someone to do". If anyone performs one of these behaviors, they immediately die
TA.Weather.7a: Agents' Anomalous connection intensifies temporarily. During this Mission, Agents can channel each others' Anomaly powers regardless of the distance between them.
TA.Weather.7b: Agents' Anomalies connect more deeply to the world around them. Agents can channel their Anomalous abilities through their Relationships and use them from their perspective. Failures and other effects the ability applies to the user apply to the one who has channeled the effect
TA.Weather.7c: Agents' Anomalies connect more deeply to the world around them. For the duration of this Mission, all starting Anomaly abilities are available to every Agent, and Agents can channel their Anomalous abilities through their Relationships and use them from their perspective. Failures and other effects the ability applies to the user apply to the person who has channeled the effect
TA.Weather.8c: The sun has shifted hues. Exposure to its light causes strange changes to living bodies.
TA.Weather.CMultiple: Alternatively, you may increase the Loose Ends by 3.
